case_title: FREDDY R CALDERON VS. VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDERON, FREDDY R MORALES AS TO DEFENDANT VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALDERON, FREDDY R MORALES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,649.80 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,753.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
